---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for SyncUp
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected, and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible — include user flows, UI sketches, or API shapes if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other approaches you've thought about? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Scope

- [ ] Backend change required
- [ ] Frontend change required
- [ ] Database schema change required
- [ ] Shared library change required
- [ ] Documentation update required

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues that provide more context.
